title: Donut Hoppers
description: A toggleable hopper mod for DonutSMP testing.
body:
## Notes Lightweight server-side mod that **upgrades vanilla hopper mechanics** to high-performance transfer speeds inspired by **DonutSMP**, without breaking vanilla behavior or compatibility. This mod is intentionally for singleplayer only. It is not a DonutSMP cheat, macro, script, bypass, or public-server automation tool.

## Features - Transfers 12 items per cycle instead of 1 - Operates every 5 ticks (1/4 second) - All speeds and transfer amounts are customizable - Works with all standard inventories and storage blocks - Maintains deterministic behavior (no randomness or desync issues) - Works seamlessly with composters - Designed to function alongside Carpet TIS optimizations - Enable or disable the system in-game

## Commands ```text /hopper ```

## Why **Why use this mod instead of vanilla hoppers?** Vanilla hoppers are slow and quickly become a bottleneck in farms and storage systems. Donut Hoppers removes that limitation by dramatically increasing transfer speed while keeping behavior consistent and predictable. **Will this break my builds or redstone systems?** Sometimes, machines that depend on sorters or other types of logic may be affected. **Who is this mod for?** Anyone testing or building farms in DonutSMP or if you want faster hopper speeds in singleplayer.

## Support Bug reports, suggestions, and questions can be posted [here](https://discord.gg/t9GQ4abDFA). This project is not affiliated with DonutSMP, Mojang, or Microsoft. It is a fan-made singleplayer utility inspired by observed hopper behavior.
